questionHtml: Write down and simplify an expression in x and y for the area of cloth, A, used to make Nanako’s bag.
markschemeHtml:
(A =) 3x2 + 2(xy) + 2(3xy)    (M1)

Note: Award (M1) for correct substitution into surface area of cuboid formula.

 

(A =) 3x2 + 8xy       (A1)(G2)

Note: Award (A1) for correct simplified surface area of cuboid formula.

 

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Write down and simplify an expression in x and y for the area of cloth, A, used to make Nanako’s bag.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 5.6—Stationary points, local max and min
